title: DESIGN.md design system
description: Data contract for the design-md format: a DESIGN.md file in Google's design.md format (github.com/google-labs-code/design.md) — machine-readable design tokens (YAML front matter) plus human-readable design rationale (Markdown sections: Overview, Colors, Typography, Layout, Elevation & Depth, Shapes, Components, Do's and Don'ts). The template renders the tokens as a visual gallery (colour swatches, type specimens, spacing & radius scales, component list) and the prose as styled Markdown; the exact DESIGN.md text is preserved in document.source. The sample's #report-data is a valid instance of this schema.

meta.description: Shared archive chrome. meta.title and meta.subtitle drive the archive card title/abstract; meta.theme sets the initial preview brand colour (independent of the design system's own tokens).

project.description: Project / product the design system belongs to.

reportType.description: Eyebrow label above the title. Defaults to 'DESIGN.md' when omitted.

title.description: Document title shown in the masthead H1, e.g. 'Acme Design System'.

subtitle.description: Optional one-line summary; also used as the archive abstract.

date.description: ISO date the spec was generated (YYYY-MM-DD).

theme.description: Initial preview brand theme applied as <html data-theme>. Default for this format is 'indigo'.

document.description: The DESIGN.md document plus a structured mirror of its tokens for the visual gallery.

filename.description: File name this would be saved as in the repo. Conventionally 'DESIGN.md'. Must end in .md.

source.description: The COMPLETE DESIGN.md text in Google design.md format: a leading YAML front matter block (delimited by lines of exactly ---) carrying the tokens, then Markdown prose using ## (h2) section headings in the canonical order Overview -> Colors -> Typography -> Layout -> Elevation & Depth -> Shapes -> Components -> Do's and Don'ts (omit sections that do not apply, keep the order). This is the canonical, downloadable artifact; the preview strips the front matter and renders the prose.

summary.description: Optional one-line description of the brand personality / who it is for, surfaced near the top.

tokens.description: Structured mirror of the front-matter tokens, used to render the visual gallery (so the template needs no YAML parser). Keep it consistent with the YAML in document.source. Any token group may be omitted.

colors.description: Colour tokens with semantic roles. Convention: primary, secondary, tertiary, neutral, plus surface/state roles as needed.

value.description: Any valid CSS colour: hex, rgb()/rgba(), hsl(), oklch(), named, etc.

typography.description: Typography levels, typically 6-15 (e.g. display, headline, title, body, label with size variants).

fontSize.description: Dimension with unit: px, em, or rem.

lineHeight.description: Unitless number (as a string) or a dimension.

value.description: Dimension with unit: px, em, or rem.

rounded.description: Corner-radius scale tokens (sm, md, lg, full).

value.description: Dimension with unit: px, em, rem, or '9999px' for full.

components.description: Named component atoms the system styles (button, input, chip, card ...).

meta.title: Acme Design System
meta.subtitle: The visual identity tokens and rationale agents use to build on-brand Acme UI.
meta.author: {{AUTHOR}}

document.summary: Calm, precise, trustworthy — a productivity brand for focused work. Indigo primary on near-white surfaces, generous spacing, soft corners.

colors.name: primary
colors.note: Brand indigo — primary actions, links, focus.

components.name: button
components.note: Filled primary; radius md; label-sm; 40px tall.

components.name: input
components.note: 1px neutral border; radius sm; focus ring primary.

components.name: card
components.note: surface bg; radius md; 1px hairline; lg padding.

document.source:
---
name: Acme Design System
description: Calm, precise, trustworthy productivity UI.
colors:
  primary: "#4338ca"
  secondary: "#0e7c86"
  tertiary: "#a21d6e"
  neutral: "#33363f"
  surface: "#ffffff"
  surface-muted: "#f6f6f8"
  success: "#1f7a44"
  danger: "#b3261e"
typography:
  display: { fontFamily: "Inter, system-ui, sans-serif", fontSize: 40px, fontWeight: 800, lineHeight: 1.1, letterSpacing: -0.02em }
  headline-lg: { fontFamily: "Inter, system-ui, sans-serif", fontSize: 28px, fontWeight: 800, lineHeight: 1.2, letterSpacing: -0.01em }
  title-md: { fontFamily: "Inter, system-ui, sans-serif", fontSize: 18px, fontWeight: 700, lineHeight: 1.3 }
  body-md: { fontFamily: "Inter, system-ui, sans-serif", fontSize: 15px, fontWeight: 400, lineHeight: 1.6 }
  label-sm: { fontFamily: "ui-monospace, monospace", fontSize: 11px, fontWeight: 600, lineHeight: 1, letterSpacing: 0.08em }
spacing:
  xs: 4px
  sm: 8px
  md: 16px
  lg: 24px
  xl: 40px
rounded:
  sm: 6px
  md: 12px
  lg: 18px
  full: 9999px
---

## Overview

**Acme** is a productivity brand: calm, precise, and trustworthy. The UI should feel focused and quiet — it gets out of the way so the work is the loudest thing on screen. Lead with **indigo** on near-white surfaces, lean on generous spacing, and keep corners soft but not playful.

## Colors

`primary` indigo carries every primary action, link, and focus ring. `secondary` teal and `tertiary` plum are accents — use them sparingly and never together in the same component. Body text is `neutral`; backgrounds alternate `surface` (white) and `surface-muted`. Reserve `success` and `danger` for state only.

## Typography

One family — **Inter** — across the product; mono only for labels, code, and numeric chips. The scale runs `display` -> `headline-lg` -> `title-md` -> `body-md` -> `label-sm`. Default reading size is `body-md` (15px / 1.6). Tighten letter-spacing on large headings; track `label-sm` wide and uppercase.

## Layout

An 8px spacing grid (`xs`-`xl`). Content max-width 1200px with `lg` gutters; card padding `lg`; stack rhythm `md`. Prefer a clear single-column reading measure over dense multi-column dashboards.

## Elevation & Depth

Flat by default. Convey hierarchy with hairline `1px` borders and `surface-muted` bands, not shadows. At most a whisper shadow on raised cards; never stacked drop-shadows or neumorphism.

## Shapes

Soft, consistent corners: `sm` for inputs/chips edges, `md` for cards and buttons, `lg` for large panels, `full` for pills and avatars. Do not mix radii within one component.

## Components

- **button** — filled `primary`, radius `md`, `label-sm` text, 40px tall; hover darkens primary.
- **input** — `1px` neutral border, radius `sm`, primary focus ring.
- **chip** — `surface-muted` background, radius `full`, `label-sm`.
- **card** — `surface` background, radius `md`, `1px` hairline, `lg` padding.

## Do's and Don'ts

- **Do** keep indigo as the single dominant accent; let whitespace do the work.
- **Do** use state colours (`success`/`danger`) only for state, never decoration.
- **Don't** introduce gradients on text, heavy shadows, or a fourth accent hue.
- **Don't** mix corner radii or tighten spacing below the 8px grid.
